basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has published the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position on a contract basis. Candidates holding a Postgraduate Degree in Physics or Chemistry or a Graduate/ Postgraduate Degree in Metallurgy, Materials Science, Energy Engineering, or Chemical Engineering with NET/ GATE or an equivalent national-level qualification are eligible to apply online through the official IIT Madras website. The application process is open until 08-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree in Physics or Chemistry or Graduate/ Postgraduate Degree in Metallurgy, Materials Science, Energy Engineering or Chemical Engineering with NET/ GATE or equivalent national level qualification
qualification.details: Postgraduate Degree in Physics or Chemistry, or Graduate/Postgraduate Degree in Metallurgy, Materials Science, Energy Engineering, or Chemical Engineering. Qualified in CSIR-UGC NET (including Lectureship) with Valid GATE or National Level Examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and Agencies such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. Desirable: Research Experience in Batteries, Voltammetry, and Electrochemistry.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Postgraduate Degree in Physics or Chemistry, or Graduate/Postgraduate Degree in Metallurgy, Materials Science, Energy Engineering, or Chemical Engineering. Qualified in CSIR-UGC NET (including Lectureship) with Valid GATE or National Level Examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and Agencies such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. Desirable: Research Experience in Batteries, Voltammetry, and Electrochemistry.

IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is July 8, 2026. Ensure you complete your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Postgraduate Degree in Physics or Chemistry, or a Graduate/Postgraduate Degree in Metallurgy, Materials Science, Energy Engineering, or Chemical Engineering, and have qualified in a relevant national-level examination like NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT Madras through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by a test or interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ICSR/PR/Advt.123/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations for this position. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for detailed information.
